General.Name: Sustainable Forest Holdings Limited
General.Description: Reliance Global Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the forest-related business in China, Hong Kong, rest of Asia, Europe, and the Middle East. It operates through Money Lending, Sustainable Forest Management, and Timber Supply Chain segments. The company offers mortgage loans, corporate loans, personal loans, and finance leases, as well as management services. It is also involved in the sustainable forest management; natural forest investment; harvesting rights licensing; and timber and wood processing activities, as well as trading and sale of forestry, timber, and wood products. In addition, the company leases properties. The company was formerly known as Sustainable Forest Holdings Limited and changed its name to Reliance Global Holdings Limited in November 2019. Reliance Global Holdings Limited was incorporated in 1991 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Great Eagle Centre, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
